title: oldenlandia esquirolii
intro: Oldenlandia esquirolii, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is also known as Chinese ephedra. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and anti-asthmatic effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia esquirolii include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its use in treating fever and joint pain. In traditional herbal preparations, Oldenlandia esquirolii is often combined with other herbs to make teas, decoctions, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
